nasb.text: Then I sent Moses and Aaron, and I plagued Egypt by what I did in its midst; and afterward I brought you out.

esv.text: And I sent Moses and Aaron, and I plagued Egypt with what I did in the midst of it, and afterward I brought you out.

cnv.text: 我差派了摩西和亞倫，藉著我在埃及所行的神蹟，用災疫擊打埃及，然後把你們領出來。

ccb.text: 后来，我差遣摩西和亚伦去埃及，并用瘟疫攻击埃及人，把你们领出来。
